itinerary.title: Premium Mizoram Leisure Tour
itinerary.tagline: Aizawl Leisure • Cultural Heritage • Scenic Valley Views • Comfortable Pacing
itinerary.overview:
TRAGUIN PREMIUM MIZORAM LEISURE TOUR — Aizawl Leisure • Cultural Heritage • Scenic Valley Views • Comfortable Pacing. 05 Nights / 06 Days Relaxing Senior-Friendly Mizoram Sojourn.

TOUR OVERVIEW
Enjoy a comfortable, relaxed, and culturally enriching experience in the beautiful hills of Mizoram with this TRAGUIN curated leisure itinerary. Specifically designed for senior citizens, this Mizoram Leisure Sojourn prioritizes comfort, slow-paced sightseeing, and easy access to local culture, guaranteeing unforgettable memories in the serene capital of Aizawl.
itinerary.seo_title: MZ-005 | Premium Mizoram Leisure Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Mizoram package (MZ-005 / TRG-MIZ-LEI-2026): Aizawl Leisure • Cultural Heritage • Scenic Valley Views • Comfortable Pacing with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: TRAGUIN curated Premium Mizoram Leisure Tour with handpicked premium stays
Vehicle / Meals: Luxury SUV / MAPAI (Breakfast & Dinner)

days.title: COMFORTABLE ARRIVAL IN AIZAWL
days.description: Arrive in Aizawl. Your private chauffeur transfers you to a premium hotel with easy access and beautiful panoramic views. Savor a relaxed evening.
activities: Private chauffeur transfer to premium hotel.

days.title: LIGHT CULTURAL EXPLORATION
days.description: A gentle city tour featuring the serene Mizoram State Museum and accessible local handicraft centers at a relaxed, senior-friendly pace.
activities: Gentle city tour at senior-friendly pace.
Mizoram State Museum and handicraft centers.

days.title: HERITAGE & SCENIC LEISURE
days.description: A short, comfortable drive to heritage areas with minimal walking required, enjoying the cool mountain air and spectacular scenic beauty.
activities: Short drive to heritage areas with minimal walking.
Cool mountain air and scenic beauty.

days.title: VALLEY VISTAS & RELAXED DINING
days.description: Spend a peaceful day overlooking the Aizawl valley from comfortable viewpoints, enjoying local delicacies in a quiet, leisurely atmosphere.

days.title: LOCAL MARKET & RELAXATION
days.description: A final day for light shopping and soaking in the tranquil ambiance of Aizawl, ensuring you collect unforgettable memories at your own pace.

days.title: COMFORTABLE DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private chauffeur transfers you comfortably to the airport for your flight home.

hotels.name: Hotel Ritz / Hotel Arini (Ground Floor)
hotels.description: OPTION 01 – DELUXE: Hotel Ritz / Hotel Arini (Ground Floor) | MAPAI (Breakfast & Dinner)

hotels.name: Classic Aizawl / Hotel Regency (Selected Senior-Friendly Suites)
hotels.description: OPTION 02 – PREMIUM: Classic Aizawl / Hotel Regency (Selected Senior-Friendly Suites) | MAPAI (Breakfast & Dinner)

hotels.name: Millennium Inn / Hotel Ahimsa (Comfort Wing)
hotels.description: OPTION 03 – LUXURY: Millennium Inn / Hotel Ahimsa (Comfort Wing) | MAPAI (Breakfast & Dinner)

hotels.name: The Grand Continental / Chawlhna Hotel (Executive Suites)
hotels.description: OPTION 04 – ULTRA LUXURY: The Grand Continental / Chawlhna Hotel (Executive Suites) | Bespoke Signature MAPAI Plan

inclusions.text: Premium Stays: 5 Nights in handpicked Mizoram properties as per chosen category.
Luxury Transportation: Private dedicated Luxury SUV for all transfers and sightseeing.
Curated Meal Plan: MAPAI — daily breakfast and dinner at handpicked venues.
TRAGUIN Support: 24/7 dedicated guest experience manager on call.
Private Transfers: Airport/railway arrival and departure transfers in premium AC vehicle.
Handpicked Stays: TRAGUIN-vetted accommodations matching your selected tier.
All applicable taxes, driver allowances, tolls, and parking charges for the private vehicle.
Senior-friendly pacing with accessible sightseeing and comfortable chauffeur-driven transfers throughout.
Airfare, domestic flight bookings, or train tickets.
Monument entry tickets, camera permits, or sanctuary entry fees.
Personal expenses such as laundry, phone calls, drinks, and tips.
Travel insurance, medical expenses, and any emergency evacuation costs.
